---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Thomas Vowler Short"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Thomas Vowler Short

**Dates:** (1790-1872)

### Description

Bishop of St. Asaph

### Biography

Brother-in-law of the Rev. Robert Wickham, he lived at Kingsworthy with his sister 1829-34 when he was Rector there.

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 5th 1897

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
